overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic Japanese-inspired urban district. The player navigates through wide plazas with holographic advertisements, narrow alleys with street vendors, and industrial backstreets while following NPC pedestrians through the rain-slicked environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial plaza with traditional Japanese kiosk

events.description: begins walking forward through the plaza toward the center structure
turns right toward street with metal railings and red neon lights

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward a traditional Japanese-style structure surrounded by neon advertisements and wet reflective pavement

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead toward the Japanese structure

entered.detail: large orange neon sign reading PRIMA on building facade
pagoda-style structure with curved roof in the middle of the plaza
large illuminated advertisement with yellow text on upper building
reflective wet ground surface showing neon color reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide neon-lit plaza at night, featuring a prominent traditional Japanese kiosk structure in the center surrounded by holographic advertisements including a large orange PRIMA sign. The camera moves forward through the sparse crowd on wet reflective pavement toward the structure before turning right.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated sidewalk with metal railings alongside multi-lane street

events.description: turns right onto sidewalk with green metal railings and red neon billboards
turns left to cross back toward the plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along a raised sidewalk with metal railings, passing under large red neon billboards with wet pavement reflections

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in opposite direction along the railing

entered.detail: green metal railings lining the edge of the raised sidewalk
large vertical red illuminated advertisement on building facade
vehicles parked along the street side behind the railing

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to an elevated sidewalk bordered by green metal railings overlooking a multi-lane street. Large red neon billboards illuminate the wet pavement as the camera moves forward, passing pedestrians walking in the opposite direction and parked cars along the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crossing back to plaza area

events.description: crossing the street between parked cars with moving traffic visible
enters narrow alleyway with descending stairs and overhead neon

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt street between parked vehicles and moving traffic, returning toward the plaza area with the Japanese kiosk

notable_agents.action: red car driving down the multi-lane street
group of pedestrians gathered near the Japanese kiosk entrance

entered.detail: returning to view of the pagoda-style structure with glowing lanterns
white painted stripes on the asphalt marking pedestrian crossing

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the multi-lane street at a crosswalk, navigating between parked cars while a red vehicle drives past. Returning to the plaza area, the Japanese kiosk comes back into view before the camera turns toward a narrow alley entrance with descending stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial alley with overhead neon signs and street vendors

events.description: descends into covered alleyway passing under TENGU neon sign
passing under bright green Kiroshi neon sign into vendor area with food stalls

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrow alleyway passing food vendors and neon signs, following other pedestrians through the sheltered corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair and red pants walking ahead into the alley
food vendor standing behind stall with green OPEN neon sign

entered.detail: purple neon sign with Japanese character TENGU mounted on building
green circular neon sign for Kiroshi Optical with Japanese text
outdoor food stand with green lighting and glowing OPEN sign
traditional Japanese lanterns hanging overhead across the alley
row of illuminated vending machines along the right wall

segments.scene_description: Entering a narrow enclosed alleyway, the scene shifts to a sheltered commercial corridor with overhead neon signs including a purple TENGU sign and green Kiroshi Optical sign. The camera descends past food vendors with traditional red paper lanterns and illuminated vending machines while following a distinctive blue-haired pedestrian.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with COLA advertisement and Meritline vending machines

events.description: follows blue-haired NPC turning corner into narrower section
enters darker industrial section of the alley with exposed beams

agents.ego_description: following a distinctive NPC with bright blue hair through a narrow corridor lined with COLA advertisements and Meritline vending machines

notable_agents.action: character with bright blue hair and red pants walking ahead
bald character in colorful jacket walking alongside the blue-haired pedestrian

entered.detail: large illuminated wall with repeated COLA text branding in white and purple
bank of vending machines with glowing product displays and Meritline branding
overhead purple neon tube lighting running along the alley ceiling

segments.scene_description: The alley continues past a large COLA advertisement wall and Meritline vending machines illuminated by purple neon strip lights overhead. The camera follows the blue-haired pedestrian and a companion through the narrowing corridor as the environment transitions toward a darker industrial section.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial service alley with exposed beams and graffiti

events.description: lighting dims significantly entering industrial section with exposed steel
approaches concrete stairs at the end of the alley

agents.ego_description: navigating a darker industrial alleyway with exposed metal beams and graffiti, approaching a stairway at the end of the corridor

notable_agents.action: silhouetted figure walking ahead toward the stairs at the alley end

entered.detail: exposed red steel support beams and girders along the alley wall
large red circular symbol painted on white wall with additional graffiti tags
stairway leading up to next level at the end of the alley
large industrial pipes running along the ceiling above the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions to a darker industrial service alley with dim lighting, exposed red steel beams, and large overhead pipes. The camera passes a prominent red circular graffiti mural on the left wall while approaching a concrete stairway at the end of the corridor, following a silhouetted figure into the depths of the alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban plaza that transitions into a bustling streetscape before narrowing into a secluded alleyway. It begins in a wide plaza, moving across wet reflective pavement past holographic advertisements and a traditional Japanese kiosk under a large orange PRIMA sign. As the camera turns right, the scene shifts to an elevated sidewalk bordered by green metal railings, where red neon billboards cast a glow over passing pedestrians and parked cars. The camera then descends to cross a multi-lane street, navigating between vehicles as a red car drives past, before circling back toward the central kiosk. Finally, the view pivots away from the open plaza to face the entrance of a narrow alley with descending stairs.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant commercial corridor that gradually descends into a dim, industrial service alley. It begins by entering a sheltered alleyway filled with overhead neon signs and red paper lanterns, following a blue-haired pedestrian past illuminated vending machines. As the camera moves deeper, the scene shifts past a large cola advertisement wall and purple neon strip lights, with the corridor narrowing as it transitions away from the commercial district. The environment then opens into a darker industrial section characterized by exposed red steel beams and large overhead pipes. Finally, the camera passes a red circular graffiti mural on the left wall before following a silhouetted figure toward a concrete stairway at the end of the alley.
